title: cyrtomium anomophyllum
intro: Cyrtomium anomophyllum, also known as the Mountain Holly Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Dryopteridaceae family. The medicinal properties of Cyrtomium anomophyllum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestive health, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory issues. Cyrtomium anomophyllum is typically prepared for medicinal use by drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules.
